reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para parar y descansar un ratito, además hay una parrilla muy buena y barata

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to stop and rest for a while, plus there is a very good and cheap grill
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXaWRUS2ZREAE

reviews.comment:
Hermoso lugar, aprovechamos el descanso y nos tomamos un tiempo, para conocer más adentro ,🤩 el área de arboledas cuidadas, las calles bien señaladas, los lugares de comidas brindan un excelente servicio y la coordialidad que todos esperamos. Aprovechen no solo el parador, les recomiendo conocer Dolores 😍😍 los lugares históricos y la disponibilidad de las personas, me hacen RECOMENDARLO!!!

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful place. We took advantage of the break and took some time to explore more of the area. The well-kept groves, the well-marked streets, and the restaurants provide excellent service and the friendliness we all expect. Don't just take advantage of the inn. I highly recommend getting to know Dolores. The historic sites and the helpful people make me RECOMMEND IT!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXaVpUTU5REAE
